summary: Tested all 6 About page CTA/form scenarios at 1080px desktop. All passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All About page CTA behaviors verified at 1080px. data-testid='nav-cta-btn' is correct selector for nav CTA (not nav-cta-button).

test_results.test1_hero_cta_opens_panel: PASS — panel slides in, heading shrinks from 70.2px to 55px
test_results.test2_escape_closes_panel: PASS — panel disappears, heading restores to 70.2px
test_results.test3_final_cta_transforms: PASS — card shows form, button disappears
test_results.test5_nav_cta_hero_visible: PASS — nav CTA opens hero panel (not modal)
test_results.test6_nav_cta_mid_page: PASS — nav CTA opens modal when past hero section
